residual_risk.summary: Phase 6 acceptance repair moved compat service factories and legacy delegate installation out of compat.py; compat.py is now a minimal shell after Phase 8.
No API route behavior change intended; final route contract remains 23 unchanged routes.
Real online provider behavior still depends on remote provider availability; verification uses mocked/unit coverage, not live provider calls.
Destructive subtitle write paths are covered by focused tests and were not live-triggered during refactor verification.
compat.py is intentionally retained as a documented legacy private API shell because required runtime references remain; final size is 256 lines and 22 AST methods.
